node.statement: delta-positivity: x>=0 => P(x) >= -delta ||x|| I. For x>=0, Phi(x)>=0 (GT-positive-unital). Let y:=P(x)-Phi(x), self-adjoint with ||y|| <= ||P-Phi|| ||x|| <= delta ||x|| (node 1.5). By GT-order-unit-norm, ||y|| <= delta||x|| gives -delta||x|| I <= y. Hence P(x)=Phi(x)+y >= 0 - delta||x|| I = -delta ||x|| I.
